feature: P0 Account Lockout Bug Fix - Auto-clear expired lockouts, remaining attempts in error messages
summary: Successfully tested the P0 account lockout fix. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend correctly displays remaining attempts in error toasts. Key fixes verified: (1) MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS=10, (2) LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES=15, (3) Auto-clear expired lockouts resets failed_login_attempts to 0, (4) Error messages show remaining attempts, (5) Admin unlock endpoints work correctly.

minor.issue: Missing 'import os' caused NameError at line 436

backend_api_tests.details: Returns 200 with access_token, refresh_token, user object

backend_api_tests.test: POST /api/auth/login - failed login shows remaining attempts
backend_api_tests.details: Returns 401 with 'Invalid email or password. 9 attempt(s) remaining.'

backend_api_tests.test: POST /api/auth/login - expired lockout auto-clears failed_attempts (P0 FIX)
backend_api_tests.details: CRITICAL: After expired lock, user gets fresh 10 attempts instead of immediate re-lock

backend_api_tests.test: POST /api/auth/login - expired lockout allows successful login
backend_api_tests.details: User can login with correct password after lock expires

backend_api_tests.test: POST /api/auth/login - account locks after 10 failed attempts
backend_api_tests.details: Returns 423 'Too many failed attempts. Account locked for 15 minutes.'

backend_api_tests.test: POST /api/auth/login - locked account returns 423 with time remaining
backend_api_tests.details: Returns 423 with message including minutes remaining

backend_api_tests.test: GET /api/auth/admin/locked-accounts - returns list of locked accounts

frontend_tests.details: Email, password inputs and Sign In button render

frontend_tests.test: Failed login shows toast with remaining attempts
frontend_tests.details: Toast shows 'Login Failed - Invalid email or password. 9 attempt(s) remaining.'
User redirected to / with 'Welcome back!' toast

frontend_tests.test: Error messages from backend displayed correctly
frontend_tests.details: apiClient extracts data.detail and displays in toast

p0_fix_verification.original_bug: After lockout expires, failed_login_attempts counter wasn't reset, so one wrong password immediately re-locked the account
p0_fix_verification.fix_verification: CONFIRMED - auto-clear logic in auth_routes.py line 154-160 resets failed_login_attempts=0 when locked_until is in the past
p0_fix_verification.test_case: test_expired_lockout_auto_clears_failed_attempts - sets expired lock with 10 failed attempts, verifies wrong password gets 401 with 9 remaining (not 423 locked)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 lockout bug fix verified. Key settings: MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS=10, LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES=15. Auto-clear logic in auth_routes.py:154-160 handles expired locks. Admin endpoints /api/auth/admin/locked-accounts and /api/auth/admin/unlock-account require admin role. Password reset also clears lockout state. Test file test_auth_lockout.py covers all scenarios including the critical expired lockout auto-reset.
